x-enumeration-literals.name: Initial Underwriting Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to commence the underwriting process, including evaluating risk, setting terms, and determining the underwriting capacity.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Commitment Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to confirm or adjust the underwriting commitment amount for a specific transaction or issuance.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Allocation Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to allocate portions of the underwritten amount to investors or participants according to pre-defined rules.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Underwriting Fee Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to calculate, apply, or distribute underwriting fees and commissions.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Amendment Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to modify underwriting terms, commitments, or allocations due to market or agreement changes.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Underwriting Settlement Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to execute the final settlement of the underwritten transaction, including fund transfers and documentation.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Risk Adjustment Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to adjust allocations or commitments based on updated risk assessments or credit evaluations.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Termination or Release Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to release or cancel underwriting obligations once conditions are met or if the transaction is withdrawn.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Follow-on Underwriting Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request for additional underwriting actions, such as subsequent tranches or renewals of commitments.
